## Summary

## Evidence
- [ ] `docs/worklog/YYYY-MM-DD.md` updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (`[Unreleased]`)
- [ ] Demo log added/updated if demo-worthy
- [ ] ADR added/updated if architecture changed

## Validation
- [ ] lint
- [ ] tests
- [ ] build
- [ ] `./scripts/check-evidence.sh`

## Security / Hygiene
- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] `.env` remains untracked
- [ ] Scope stays within v0.1 (no accidental v0.2 additions)

## Notes / Risks
